name: standards fetcher: standards/fetchers/rfc-style.sh extracts numbered RFC-style sections (e.g. 3.2.1 nested numbering)
command:
printf "1. Intro
body
2. Main
2.1. Sub
sub content
2.2. Other
other content
" > rfc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetchers/rfc-style.sh" --in "$PWD/rfc.txt" --section "2.1" 2>out.txt && grep "sub content" out.txt 1>&2 && ! grep "other content" out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
